prompt: Implement a small Go helper that returns true when a string contains only ASCII letters, digits, dash, or underscore. Include a concise table-driven unit test.
Refactor this pseudocode into clearer Python without changing behavior: read a list of integers, remove duplicates, sort ascending, and return the first ten values.
A Node.js script fails with TypeError: cannot read properties of undefined reading 'map'. Explain the likely cause and show a simple defensive fix.
Write a short README snippet that explains how to run unit tests and lint checks for a Go service.
Add input validation to a REST handler so empty name values return HTTP 400. Show the core handler logic and one unit test.
Explain why a Kubernetes Service might return connection refused when the selector does not match any pods. Include two kubectl commands to confirm it.
Convert a JavaScript array of user records into a map keyed by user id. Keep the answer brief and include one example.
Generate pytest cases for a function clamp(value, min_value, max_value). Cover normal values, lower bound, upper bound, and invalid bounds.
Write a small Python function that merges two sorted integer arrays and include one unit test.
Briefly explain eventual consistency in two sentences for a new developer.
Update a README sentence to expand the acronym CRDT and link to the existing architecture page.
Recommend a clear variable name for a boolean that records whether a cache entry has expired.
Write a Go helper that returns a copy of a string-to-string map with one key updated. Include one table-driven test.
Implement a Python retry wrapper that retries a callable twice after a transient exception, then re-raises it.
Write a TypeScript type guard for an object with required id and name string properties.
Write a Bash function that exits with a clear error when a required directory argument does not exist.
Show a small Java method that parses an optional integer string and returns a default value on invalid input.
Add simple validation to a C# request object so an email field must contain an at sign before processing.
Write a Rust CLI snippet that reads one required filename argument and prints a helpful usage error when it is missing.
Write a Ruby method that groups log records by level and returns a count for each level.
Write a SQL migration that adds an index on orders created_at and include a rollback statement.
Implement a small JavaScript debounce helper and show one short usage example.
Write a Go HTTP middleware that adds an X-Request-ID header when the incoming request lacks one.
Write Python code that reads a CSV with name and score columns and returns the names whose score is at least 90.
Show a concise JSON Schema for a configuration object with a required port integer from 1 through 65535.
Write a Kotlin expression that converts a list of users into a map keyed by email, keeping the last duplicate.
Add a Makefile target named test that runs go test ./... and fails when any package fails.
Write a React Testing Library test that verifies a Save button becomes disabled while an async submit is pending.
A Node service sees undefined for process.env.PORT. Explain the likely deployment mistake and show a safe default.
Write a shell command that lists regular files larger than 100 MB below the current directory.
Give CSS that truncates a single-line label with an ellipsis inside a fixed-width table cell.
Write a Java method that returns the number of whole days between two LocalDate values.
Show a PHP function that filters null values from an associative array without removing false or zero.
Add a context timeout around an outbound HTTP request in Go and return a readable timeout error.
Define a Python dataclass for a product with sku, name, and optional description fields.
Write a Terraform variable block for an environment name with validation that permits dev, staging, or prod.
Add a Kubernetes readiness probe for an application that exposes GET /healthz on port 8080.
Show a Helm template expression that sets replicas to 1 when .Values.replicas is unset.
Write a minimal GitHub Actions job that runs npm ci followed by npm test on pull requests.
Write a Python helper that returns true only for strings containing lowercase letters, digits, and dots.
Show a parameterized SQL query that returns the next page of users after a supplied numeric id.
Write a Go table-driven test for a function that trims surrounding whitespace and lowercases an email address.
Show a pytest test using monkeypatch to replace an environment variable for one function call.
A JavaScript promise rejection is logged as unhandled. Explain the small code change needed to handle it.
Write a Bash trap that removes a temporary file on normal exit or interruption.
Write a minimal Docker Compose service for Redis with a named data volume and port 6379 exposed locally.
Write a Python function that reads a dictionary key and returns a fallback value when the key is absent or null.
Implement a Go function that formats a duration in whole seconds as a short human-readable string.
Define a Go struct with JSON tags for a user payload containing id, displayName, and active fields.
Write a Java enum for pending, running, and completed job states and a method that reports whether a state is terminal.
Write a concise RSpec example for a method that returns an empty array when given nil input.
Write a TypeScript generic helper that returns the first item in an array or undefined when it is empty.
Create a pytest fixture that supplies a temporary directory containing a small configuration file.
Show a curl command that retries a GET request up to three times on transient server errors.
Add a GitHub Actions cache step for Go modules keyed by go.sum.
Write a small OpenAPI response definition for a 400 validation error with code and message fields.
Show a logging helper pattern that redacts a password field before writing a request object to logs.
Add a maximum length check of 256 characters to a username field in a REST handler.
Write a short function that compares two semantic version strings containing only major, minor, and patch numbers.
Explain in two sentences when a buffered Go channel is useful.
A Go test intermittently times out waiting on a channel. Show a simple select with a timeout that makes the failure clear.
Write a short contributor-guide paragraph explaining how to create a feature branch and run checks before opening a pull request.
Write a Bash snippet that accepts an optional --verbose flag and prints usage for unknown arguments.
Write a Python regular expression and helper that validates a simple YYYY-MM-DD date string.
Write a PostgreSQL upsert for a settings table keyed by user_id that updates the value on conflict.
Convert a list of key-value pairs into a Java Map while ignoring pairs whose key is blank.
Write a table-driven Go test for a function that returns the greater of two integers.
Explain how to mount one ConfigMap key as a file in a Kubernetes Pod and show the relevant volume snippet.
Write a concise IAM policy example that allows reading objects only from one named S3 bucket.
Show a GitHub Actions matrix that runs a Python test job on versions 3.11 and 3.12.
Write a Go example that encodes a struct to JSON and returns the bytes with any error.
Show a Java Optional expression that returns a configured timeout or a default of 30 seconds.
Write a Rust function that parses a positive u16 port number from a string and returns a Result.
Write a small React controlled input component that calls onChange with the current string value.
Show how to define a required --config flag with Python argparse and print a helpful description.
Write a README example showing how to request the second page of a REST endpoint with page and pageSize parameters.
Write a SQL query that counts orders by status for the last seven days.
Write a unit test for retry logic that uses a fake clock or injected sleep function instead of real delays.
Write a Python function that returns the sum of positive integers in a list and ignores other values.
Show Terraform locals that merge common tags with a required environment tag.
Write a .dockerignore file that excludes Git metadata, Python caches, and local environment files.
Write a small NGINX location block that proxies /api to a backend service on port 8080.
Write a jq filter that selects objects whose enabled field is true and prints only their name fields.
Add a Makefile lint target that runs golangci-lint and exits nonzero on findings.
A YAML parser reports an unexpected indent. Explain the likely issue and show a two-line corrected example.
Explain the difference between O(n) and O(n log n) in plain language with one sorting example.
Write a minimal Go handler that returns status 204 with no response body after a successful delete.
Recommend a clear function name for code that determines whether a cache entry is still valid.
Write a short README section that explains how to install and run a pre-commit hook.
Write a helper that builds a cache key from a user id and resource id using a colon separator.
Show a JavaScript function that safely parses JSON and returns null when parsing fails.
Write a test that verifies a function returns an error when its context has already been canceled.
Write a Python script fragment that deletes files older than 30 days from one supplied directory.
Write a small helper that normalizes an email address by trimming spaces and lowercasing it.
Write a TypeScript function that returns whether a string starts with one of several allowed prefixes.
Draft a concise pull request template with sections for summary, testing, and risk.
Write a Makefile target that formats Go files with gofmt and then runs go vet ./....
Show a minimal health endpoint response in Express that returns JSON with a status field.

Design a multi-region job scheduler that guarantees at-most-once execution under network partitions. Compare leader election, leases, fencing tokens, and idempotency. Call out failure modes and what invariants must hold.
Sketch a TLA+ specification for a replicated counter with primary failover. Identify safety invariants, liveness assumptions, and one counterexample the spec should catch.

We see rare duplicate payments after retries. Logs show timeout before commit, then a later success from another worker. Analyze likely root causes across idempotency keys, transaction isolation, retry policy, and message acknowledgements.
Synthesize the tradeoffs between CRDTs, operational transform, and server-authoritative conflict resolution for collaborative text editing. Recommend when each approach is appropriate.

A Raft cluster occasionally elects two leaders in the same term during clock skew and disk stalls. Reason through what should be impossible, what implementation bugs could permit it, and what instrumentation would prove the hypothesis.
For an eventually consistent shopping cart, propose a merge function and prove the key convergence and monotonicity properties informally. Include one edge case involving item deletion.

An async Rust service deadlocks only under high load when cancellation races with a timeout. Give a diagnostic plan covering lock ordering, await points, task cancellation, tracing spans, and a minimal reproducer.

Design a control plane rollout strategy for thousands of edge gateways. Compare push vs pull config distribution, consistency guarantees, backpressure, rollback, blast-radius limits, and observability.
Define merge semantics for replicated inventory state and justify convergence, monotonic growth, and deletion behavior when updates arrive in different orders.
Analyze a state-based replication algorithm and prove that its merge operation is associative, commutative, and idempotent, including a tombstone counterexample.
Assess decentralized sequence data types, transformation-based concurrency control, and centralized arbitration for a multi-user editor, then recommend an approach from the tradeoffs.
Synthesize competing approaches to conflict resolution in collaborative applications and give decision criteria for choosing among them.
Design a multi-region checkout service that prevents duplicate orders when clients retry across regions. Compare idempotency keys, reservation records, and transactional outbox patterns.
Develop a TLA+ style state model for cluster membership changes with join, leave, and failed nodes. State safety invariants and the liveness assumptions required.
Design an event pipeline with effectively-once business processing across Kafka, a database, and an external email provider. Explain retries, deduplication, and recovery after partial failure.
Kafka consumers occasionally apply account updates out of order after a partition rebalance. Diagnose possible causes and propose a correct ordering and replay strategy.
Compare CRDT, operation log, and server-authoritative designs for an offline-first task list with concurrent edits and deletes. Recommend one and justify its convergence behavior.
A Go service memory footprint grows only during peak traffic and never fully returns. Give a structured diagnostic plan using heap profiles, allocation sampling, and workload correlation.
Specify the linearizability requirements for a lock-free stack and outline how a model checker could expose an ABA-related counterexample.
Compare Jepsen-style fault testing, deterministic simulation, and property-based testing for distributed storage systems. Explain the failures each method is best at finding.
Design a control-plane configuration rollout system for 50,000 gateways with staged rollout, rollback, acknowledgement tracking, and blast-radius controls.
Design hierarchical rate limiting for a multi-tenant API that has global, tenant, and endpoint limits across several regions. Address fairness and partition behavior.
Design a saga for booking travel across flight, hotel, and payment services. Describe compensation order, idempotency, and how to recover a stalled saga.
Model a read-through cache with invalidation messages that may be delayed or duplicated. Identify the consistency guarantee it can realistically provide and its key invariants.
Investigate a suspected split brain in a leader-elected service where two nodes accept writes after a network partition. Identify evidence, root causes, and fencing fixes.
Design a reliable webhook delivery platform with tenant isolation, retries, signing, backoff, dead-letter handling, and operator visibility.
Compare snapshot isolation, serializable isolation, and application-level idempotency for preventing inventory oversell in a high-volume ordering system.
Design authorization for a multi-tenant control plane with delegated administrators, cross-tenant support access, auditability, and least-privilege break-glass access.
Design a durable queue for tasks that may run for hours and must survive worker crashes. Compare leases, heartbeats, visibility timeouts, and duplicate execution controls.
Define safety and liveness properties for a distributed auction that closes at a deadline despite delayed messages and participant retries.
A service intermittently fails TLS handshakes only after certificate rotation. Develop a debugging plan covering trust stores, SNI, session resumption, and rollout skew.
Compare fair queuing, shortest-job-first, and priority scheduling for a shared inference platform. Discuss starvation, tail latency, and tenant fairness.
Design tenant isolation for a SaaS data platform that shares compute but must prevent noisy neighbors, data leakage, and runaway cost.
Design a globally distributed feature-flag system where safety-critical disables propagate quickly but ordinary configuration can be eventually consistent.
Specify an epoch-based leadership protocol and explain how the design prevents an old leader from committing writes after a newer epoch begins.
A JVM service has periodic latency spikes with no increase in request rate. Analyze how to separate garbage collection, lock contention, and downstream saturation hypotheses.
Design an outbox-based integration between an orders database and a search index. Cover transaction boundaries, replay, schema evolution, and duplicate events.
Design a metrics ingestion pipeline for millions of samples per second with backpressure, retention tiers, cardinality controls, and query isolation.
Compare consistency and durability tradeoffs of vector databases, relational databases with vector extensions, and dedicated search engines for retrieval workloads.
For a replicated add-remove set, explain the merge rules required for convergence and construct an edge case involving concurrent remove and re-add operations.
A Kubernetes workload is healthy locally but repeatedly restarts in production under load. Form competing hypotheses across probes, resource limits, DNS, and dependency startup.
Design an identity control plane that issues short-lived credentials to workloads in multiple clusters and rotates trust roots without an outage.
Design a financial ledger service that supports holds, captures, reversals, and reconciliation while preserving an immutable audit trail.
Compare chaos experiments, fault injection in tests, and production game days for validating resilience. Explain how to choose safe hypotheses and stop conditions.
State correctness properties for a distributed lock service with leases and clock uncertainty, then explain a counterexample caused by a paused lock holder.
A database-backed service sees rising deadlocks after a deploy. Analyze lock ordering, transaction scope, index changes, and retry behavior, then propose an investigation.
Design disaster recovery for a customer-facing API with a one-hour recovery point objective and a fifteen-minute recovery time objective. Include drills and failback.
Design a quota system that enforces monthly tenant limits while accepting events from multiple regions with delayed replication.
Design secret rotation for thousands of services that use database credentials, including staged rollout, dual credentials, audit evidence, and emergency revocation.
Compare latency-aware load balancing, least-connections, and power-of-two-choices for a heterogeneous service fleet with variable request cost.
An API has good median latency but extreme p99 latency. Develop an investigation that distinguishes queueing, GC, lock contention, and slow downstream calls.
Outline a state-machine specification for a two-phase transaction coordinator and identify safety violations caused by duplicate or delayed commit messages.
Design a governed machine-learning feature pipeline with lineage, backfills, online and offline consistency, access controls, and rollback for bad features.
Plan a zero-downtime migration of a multi-terabyte database between storage systems while writes continue. Cover dual writes, backfill, validation, and cutover.
A Go service deadlocks during shutdown when cancellation races with worker completion. Give a diagnostic approach involving goroutine dumps, ownership, and wait groups.
Compare event sourcing, immutable append-only logs, and change-data-capture for auditability, replay, and operational complexity in regulated systems.
Design a service-mesh control plane with policy distribution, certificate rotation, fail-open and fail-closed decisions, and observability for propagation lag.
Specify a reservation system for limited inventory and identify invariants that prevent both oversell and permanently stranded reservations.
A Linux service loses file descriptors after several days. Explain how to determine whether leaks come from sockets, files, subprocesses, or monitoring agents.
Design cache invalidation for a multi-region product catalog where updates must reach checkout quickly but browse pages may tolerate bounded staleness.
Design deletion workflows for privacy requests across primary data, analytics, backups, search indexes, and event logs. Explain evidence and retention tradeoffs.
Compare Raft, Paxos, and leaderless quorum approaches for a metadata store. Focus on operational behavior, read semantics, and failure recovery.
An application produces conflicting timestamps across regions. Diagnose clock synchronization, leap handling, ordering semantics, and the implications for database writes.
Define the assumptions and invariants of a lease protocol when clocks can drift and messages can be delayed beyond the lease interval.
Design multi-region feature delivery for a mobile application with offline clients, staged exposure, emergency kill switches, and deterministic cohort assignment.
A dual-write migration shows rare divergence between old and new stores. Develop a plan for detection, repair, ordering analysis, and safe cutover criteria.
Design key management for envelope encryption across regions, including tenant isolation, key rotation, disaster recovery, and access audit requirements.
Compare log compaction, snapshotting, and tiered storage strategies for long-lived event streams with strict replay and cost requirements.
Specify a distributed semaphore with permits, cancellations, and client retries. Identify safety and liveness properties and a race a test should expose.
An asynchronous Python service slowly accumulates pending tasks. Explain how to trace task creation, cancellation, reference retention, and downstream backpressure.
Design an audit logging platform that is tamper-evident, queryable, privacy-aware, and able to ingest events during partial regional outages.
Design collaborative document editing with offline work, concurrent formatting changes, and conflict resolution. Compare OT, CRDTs, and server serialization.
Compare distributed tracing sampling strategies for incident response, cost control, and rare-error detection in a high-volume microservice platform.
Describe a formal model for distributed garbage collection of references across nodes and the conditions required to avoid reclaiming a reachable object.
A service becomes slower after adding a cache. Develop hypotheses involving cache stampedes, eviction churn, serialization overhead, and stale dependency connections.
Design a payment authorization platform with regional failover, fraud checks, idempotent retries, ledger reconciliation, and an operator override path.
Design backup and restore for a globally replicated database so operators can recover to a point in time without violating replication ordering guarantees.
Design software supply-chain provenance for build artifacts, including signing, verification at deployment, revocation, and handling compromised builders.
Compare approximate nearest-neighbor index update strategies for high-write vector search, focusing on freshness, recall, operational cost, and failure recovery.
For replicated inventory with reservations and cancellations, define a merge strategy and explain how it preserves convergence while preventing negative availability.
A Rust service crashes only under sustained load with suspected unsafe memory access. Outline a plan using sanitizers, minimal reproducers, and ownership review.
Design global DNS and traffic steering for active-active services with health signals, slow-start, regional evacuation, and protection from flapping.
Design reliable inter-service messaging for order fulfillment with duplicate delivery, poison messages, long-running work, and exactly-once business effects.
Compare practical Byzantine fault-tolerant consensus with crash-fault consensus for a system that may include untrusted partners. Discuss complexity and operational cost.
Specify safe certificate authority rotation for a distributed fleet and identify invariants that ensure every node can validate a trusted path during migration.
A client connection pool causes timeouts even though backend CPU is low. Develop a debugging plan covering pool limits, DNS, TLS, retries, and socket exhaustion.
Design alert routing for a large enterprise with ownership changes, escalation policies, duplicate suppression, maintenance windows, and auditability.
Design a distributed rate limiter that remains correct during Redis failover and regional partitions. Compare local fallback, leases, and reconciliation.
Design active-active identity federation across regions with session revocation, key rotation, regional isolation, and recovery from stale directory data.
Compare schema evolution approaches for event streams, including backward compatibility, upcasters, dual reads, and consumer-driven contracts.
Define consistency invariants for an event-sourced account balance service with snapshots, replay, duplicate events, and compensating transactions.
An etcd-backed control plane has sporadic write latency spikes. Analyze quorum health, disk fsync, network jitter, watch load, and compaction as causes.
Design a multi-cloud service placement system that respects data residency, latency targets, capacity constraints, and controlled evacuation during an outage.
Replicas of a configuration service occasionally disagree after recovery from an outage. Develop a plan to identify missed updates, divergent snapshots, and unsafe repairs.
Compare chargeback models for shared platform services using requests, tokens, CPU, and reserved capacity. Discuss incentives, accuracy, and implementation complexity.
Model a message protocol with delayed, duplicated, and reordered packets, then state the invariant that prevents a receiver from applying a command twice.
A Java service has a rare data race that corrupts a shared cache. Give a diagnostic and remediation plan covering memory visibility, synchronization, and tests.
Design a durable workflow engine for business processes that run for days, require human approvals, survive code deploys, and provide exactly-once side effects.
A Go test flakes once every few hundred runs because it sleeps for 100ms before checking a goroutine result. Explain the likely issue and show a simple deterministic fix.
Design a distributed rate limiter that remains correct during Redis failover and regional network partitions. Compare token bucket, sliding window, local fallback, and global reconciliation.
Write a SQL migration that adds a nullable description column and backfills it from name for existing rows. Keep the answer concise.
Compare recent approaches to fuzzing distributed databases for isolation anomalies. Summarize the testing strategy, oracle design, and practical limits.
